title: CBN Appoints New Executives for Union Bank, Keystone Bank, and Polaris Bank
description: Following the dissolution of the Board and Management of Union Bank, Keystone Bank and Polaris Bank on Wednesday, January 10, the CBN has appointed new executives to oversee the affairs of the banks;
html:
Following the dissolution of the Board and Management of Union Bank, Keystone
Bank and Polaris Bank on Wednesday, January 10, the CBN has appointed new
executives to oversee the affairs of the banks;

Union Bank
Yetunde Oni – Managing Director/Chief Executive Officer
Mannir Ubali Ringim – Executive Director

Keystone Bank
Hassan Imam – Managing Director/ Chief Executive Officer
Chioma A. Mang – Executive Director

Polaris Bank
Lawal Mudathir Omokayode Akintola – Managing Director/ Chief Executive Officer
Chris Onyeka Ofikulu – Executive Director

The appointments take immediate effect.
